Package org.eventb.core.ast.datatype

Interface IDatatype

All Known Implementing Classes:
Datatype
public interface IDatatype
Common protocol for datatypes.

Instances of this interface are built using the IDatatypeBuilder protocol.

The datatype name can be retrieved in its ITypeConstructorExtension using IFormulaExtension.getSyntaxSymbol() as well as the names of formal type parameters using ITypeConstructorExtension.getFormalNames().

Extensions returned by getExtensions() are intended to be passed to FormulaFactory.getInstance(Set) (possibly within a larger set of extensions) in order to get a factory able to parse and build formulas containing references to this datatype.

Extensions related to a datatype (type constructor, constructors, destructors) all have an instance of their IDatatype as origin ( IFormulaExtension.getOrigin()).

Since:
3.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FormulaFactory
    getBaseFactory()
    Returns a minimal formula factory that contains all extensions that are needed to define this datatype.
    IConstructorExtension
    getConstructor(String name)
    Returns the value constructor with the given name, or null if not found.
    IConstructorExtension[]
    getConstructors()
    Returns all value constructors of this datatype.
    IDestructorExtension
    getDestructor(String name)
    Returns the destructor with the given name, or null if not found.
    Set<IFormulaExtension>
    getExtensions()
    Returns a set of all the formula extensions defined by this datatype.
    FormulaFactory
    getFactory()
    Returns a minimal formula factory that contains this datatype.
    Object
    getOrigin()
    Returns the origin of this extension, or null if no origin is defined.
    ISetInstantiation
    getSetInstantiation(Expression set)
    Returns an object that can be used to compute the actual sets of arguments of constructors of this datatype.
    ITypeConstructorExtension
    getTypeConstructor()
    Returns the type constructor of this datatype.
    ITypeInstantiation
    getTypeInstantiation(Type type)
    Returns an object that can be used to compute the actual types of arguments of constructors of this datatype.

  • Method Details

    • getTypeConstructor

      ITypeConstructorExtension getTypeConstructor()
      Returns the type constructor of this datatype.

      Returned extension can be used as parameter in FormulaFactory.makeParametricType(IExpressionExtension, List) as well as makeExtendedExpression(IExpressionExtension, ...) methods.

      Returns:
      the type constructor

    • getConstructor

      IConstructorExtension getConstructor(String name)
      Returns the value constructor with the given name, or null if not found.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of a value constructor
      Returns:
      the value constructor with the given name or null

    • getConstructors

      IConstructorExtension[] getConstructors()
      Returns all value constructors of this datatype.
      Returns:
      an array of all value constructors

    • getDestructor

      IDestructorExtension getDestructor(String name)
      Returns the destructor with the given name, or null if not found.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of a destructor
      Returns:
      the destructor with the given name or null

    • getBaseFactory

      FormulaFactory getBaseFactory()
      Returns a minimal formula factory that contains all extensions that are needed to define this datatype. For instance, if the type of an argument of a value constructor uses another datatype, the base factory will contain this datatype.
      Returns:
      a formula factory supporting the definition of this datatype

    • getFactory

      FormulaFactory getFactory()
      Returns a minimal formula factory that contains this datatype. This is a shorthand fully equivalent to 
       getBaseFactory().withExtensions(getExtensions());
      Returns:
      a formula factory supporting this datatype

    • getExtensions

      Set<IFormulaExtension> getExtensions()
      Returns a set of all the formula extensions defined by this datatype. This set is not modifiable by clients.

      Defined extensions are:

    • the type constructor
    • all value constructors
    • all destructors

      • Returns:
      an unmodifiable set of all formula extensions

    • getTypeInstantiation

      ITypeInstantiation getTypeInstantiation(Type type)
      Returns an object that can be used to compute the actual types of arguments of constructors of this datatype.
      Parameters:
      type - a type built with the type constructor of this datatype
      Returns:
      a type instantiation usable for computing argument types
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given type is not a parametric type built with the type constructor of this datatype

    • getSetInstantiation

      ISetInstantiation getSetInstantiation(Expression set)
      Returns an object that can be used to compute the actual sets of arguments of constructors of this datatype.
      Parameters:
      set - a set built with the type constructor of this datatype
      Returns:
      a set instantiation usable for computing argument sets
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given set is not a set built with the type constructor of this datatype

    • getOrigin

      Object getOrigin()
      Returns the origin of this extension, or null if no origin is defined.
      Returns:
      an Object or null
      Since:
      3.1
